label: Reward P&L Breakdown
description: P&L decomposition by reward factor: staking yield, restaking, seasonal bonuses, and protocol incentives.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. Error boundary via WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx (global). requiredEntitlements=[execution-basic,execution-full], availableOn=[defi]. No any/ts-ignore, no mock imports. Added error guard (null rewardPnl), loading guard (empty entries), and empty state (all amounts zero). No dead code.

1.1.note: Data sourced exclusively from useDeFiData() hook. 1.2: Context calls useGlobalScope() at line 188. 1.3: organizationIds filter implemented via hasDefiDesk memo (lines 191-194). 1.4: Client cascade piggybacks on org filter (CLIENTS.some check). 1.5: strategyIds filter applied to tradeHistory (lines 210-212); rewardPnl is not strategy-filtered by design (it is an aggregate metric). 1.6: Empty scope arrays return hasDefiDesk=true giving full data. 1.7: rewardPnl sourced from MOCK_REWARD_PNL in lib/mocks/fixtures — this is in the context layer (not the widget), and the context is explicitly out of scope for this audit; no widget-level mock imports found.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

l3.notes: Display-only widget — all agent checks pass. 3.3/3.4 N/A.

3.1.note: live ✓ / paper ✓ / batch ✓ — display-only P&L breakdown.

4.1.note: No interactive buttons. Display-only breakdown chart.

l5.notes: Display-only — no execution flow. L5 agent checks complete.

5.1.note: Target strategies: CARRY_RECURSIVE_STAKED, YIELD_STAKING_SIMPLE — reward P&L breakdown is core to staking/recursive strategy attribution.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl colors in widget file.

7.2.note: No mock data in widget file. Data via useDeFiData().

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No inline objects in memo deps.

8.1.note: text-[10px] at line 126 migrated to text-micro utility backed by --text-micro token (0.625rem) added to globals.css @theme.

8.4.note: Agent: no img without alt. Human: keyboard pass required.

l8.notes: 8.1 deferred pending --text-label-micro token. 8.5: human resize test required.

keepSeparate.rationale: Reward P&L attribution detail is visually distinct from the reward claim list — kept separate for layout flexibility.

relationships.notes: Could be merged into defi-staking-rewards as a collapsible section.

dataContract.notes: P&L data refreshes on 60s interval. Attribution breakdown is computed server-side.

gaps.notes: P&L attribution by strategy not shown — only aggregate breakdown.

findings.description: 0.6 Loading state missing — widget had no guard for empty rewardPnl entries (context always populates but guard is required by spec).
0.7 Empty state missing — no guard when all reward factors have amount=0; widget would silently render zero-total without user-facing message.
0.8 Error state missing — no guard for null/undefined rewardPnl context value.

1.7 rewardPnl data sourced from lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-walkthrough in defi-data-context.tsx (MOCK_REWARD_PNL). This is a context-layer issue; widget itself has no mock imports. Context modification is out of scope for this audit pass.

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro Tailwind utility backed by --text-micro token (0.625rem) added to globals.css @theme.
